name: alcops-azure-devops-extension
description: Azure DevOps pipeline tasks to download and install ALCops code analyzers for AL (Business Central)

scripts.package: npm run bundle && npx tfx extension create --manifest-globs vss-extension.json --output-path ./out
scripts.package:dev: npm run bundle && npx tfx extension create --manifest-globs vss-extension.dev.json --output-path ./out
scripts.publish: npm run bundle && npx tfx extension publish --manifest-globs vss-extension.json
scripts.publish:dev: npm run bundle && npx tfx extension publish --manifest-globs vss-extension.dev.json
